hooks.command: bash -c 'LOCAL="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/momentum/hooks/lint-format.sh"; GLOBAL="$HOME/.claude/momentum/hooks/lint-format.sh"; if [ -f "$LOCAL" ]; then exec bash "$LOCAL" "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; elif [ -f "$GLOBAL" ]; then exec bash "$GLOBAL" "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; fi'

bash -c 'LOCAL="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/momentum/hooks/file-protection.sh"; GLOBAL="$HOME/.claude/momentum/hooks/file-protection.sh"; if [ -f "$LOCAL" ]; then exec bash "$LOCAL"; elif [ -f "$GLOBAL" ]; then exec bash "$GLOBAL"; fi'

bash -c 'LOCAL="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/momentum/hooks/stop-gate.sh"; GLOBAL="$HOME/.claude/momentum/hooks/stop-gate.sh"; if [ -f "$LOCAL" ]; then exec bash "$LOCAL"; elif [ -f "$GLOBAL" ]; then exec bash "$GLOBAL"; fi'
